decks.notes: This Mono Green Aggro deck focuses on quickly building a wide board of creatures and using them to overwhelm the opponent. With efficient mana ramp from Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage, as well as creatures like Ba Sing Se and Badgermole Cub to quickly establish a strong board presence. Earthbender Ascension provides a powerful late-game payoff for playing lots of creatures, and Escape Tunnel can protect key creatures from removal spells. Overall, the deck aims to apply constant pressure and close out the game before the opponent can stabilize.

The deck focuses on utilizing powerful combo pieces to reanimate creatures from the graveyard, taking advantage of synergy between cards like Deceit and Restless Reef to bring back key threats such as Harvester of Misery. The strategy is to disrupt opponents with cards like Intimidation Tactics and Stock Up while setting up a game-winning combo with cards like Requiting Hex and Doomsday Excruciator. Ultimately, the goal is to overwhelm opponents with a combination of reanimated threats and disruptive spells to secure victory.

This aggro deck focuses on using powerful creatures and spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. The deck features a mix of red, blue, black, green, and white cards to provide versatility and power. Cards like Flamebraider, Ashling, Rekindled, and Roaming Throne are used to deal damage and control the board. Sunderflock and Winternight Stories provide additional utility and card advantage. With a mix of threats and disruption, this deck aims to apply constant pressure and close out games swiftly.

The main focus of this Izzet Control deck is to maintain control of the game through a combination of counterspells, removal, and card draw. By using cards like Spell Snare and Spell Pierce to counter opponent's spells, Burst Lightning and Sunderflock to remove threats, and Sleight of Hand and Opt to draw into more resources, the deck aims to stall the game until it can play powerful finishers like Hearth Elemental and Glacial Dragonhunt to close out the game. Additionally, cards like Abandon Attachments and Bounce Off provide additional control options to disrupt the opponent's game plan.

The deck focuses on utilizing a combination of low-cost aggressive creatures and disruptive spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. By efficiently deploying threats like Spyglass Siren and Floodpits Drowner, while also disrupting the opponent's plans with cards like Spell Snare and Requiting Hex, the deck aims to maintain constant pressure and control the pace of the game. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Multiversal Passage and Watery Grave allows for flexibility in mana fixing and resource management. Overall, the deck is designed to be fast, efficient, and adaptable in a 1 vs 1 Standard format.

This Rakdos Aggro deck focuses on aggressive plays and quickly overwhelming opponents with powerful creatures and burn spells. By utilizing cards like Flamewake Phoenix and Marauding Mako, the deck aims to deal damage quickly and efficiently. The inclusion of Blood Crypt and Multiversal Passage allows for flexibility in mana fixing, while Monument to Endurance provides resilience against removal spells. With a mix of creatures and burn spells, this deck is designed to put pressure on opponents from the start and maintain a strong board presence throughout the game.

The deck focuses on utilizing various cards to quickly fill the graveyard with creatures. It then uses cards like Bringer of the Last Gift and Haunter of Misery to reanimate these creatures onto the battlefield. Additionally, cards like Deceit and Requiting Hex provide removal and disruption to control the game. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of powerful reanimated creatures and control elements. The key strategy is to quickly fill the graveyard with powerful creatures and then bring them back onto the battlefield for a devastating combo.

The main concept of this Aggro Simic deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of low-cost creatures with strong abilities such as Gene Pollinator and Quantum Riddler, supported by ramp cards like Llanowar Elves and Nature's Rhythm. The deck aims to quickly build a strong board presence and utilize cards like Spider-Sense and Spider Manifestation to control the board while applying pressure. The inclusion of powerful creatures like Craterhoof Behemoth and Marang River Regent can provide a finishing blow to secure victory before the opponent can mount a significant defense.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly establish board presence and apply aggressive pressure on the opponent. By utilizing a combination of low-cost creatures like Abhorrent Oculus and Iron-Shield Elf, alongside disruptive spells like Spell Snare and Bitter Triumph, the deck aims to control the tempo of the game and overwhelm the opponent with its aggressive strategy. The deck also includes card draw options like Chart a Course and Winternight Stories to maintain hand advantage and keep up the pressure on the opponent.

This deck focuses on controlling the game by using a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and card draw. The goal is to disrupt the opponent's game plan while building up resources with cards like Consult the Star Charts and Stock Up. The deck also includes some versatile creatures like Songcrafter Mage and Mightform Harmonizer to apply pressure while still maintaining a defensive strategy. The mana base is designed to support a variety of spells and ensure consistent access to different colors of mana.

The main idea of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells, focusing on utilizing the Dimir colors to control the board and apply pressure. By combining cards that provide evasion, card draw, and removal, this deck aims to consistently maintain board presence and tempo, while also disrupting opponent's strategies. The inclusion of cards like Bitterbloom Bearer and Tishana's Tidebinder helps to ensure that the aggressive game plan is executed effectively, while also providing options for late-game control.

The main focus of this Aggro Red Deck Wins deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and direct damage spells. By playing low-cost creatures like Hired Claw and Sunspine Lynx, along with a mix of burn spells like Shock and Burst Lightning, the deck aims to deal damage fast and efficiently. Key cards like Nova Hellkite and Zhao, the Moon Slayer provide additional firepower, while cards like Soulstone Sanctuary and Tersa Lightshatter help to protect against removal spells. The overall strategy is to maintain pressure and close out the game before the opponent can stabilize.

This deck focuses on fast, aggressive play using a mix of red and blue cards to deal direct damage to the opponent and control the board with powerful creatures like Ashling, Rekindled and Flamebraider. It also includes cards like Wistfulness and Sunderflock to generate card advantage and maintain pressure on the opponent. The deck's strategy revolves around quickly building a board presence while disrupting the opponent's game plan, ultimately overwhelming them with fast, aggressive threats and burn spells.

This deck focuses on building a fast and aggressive board presence using a combination of cheap creatures and disruptive spells. By utilizing cards like Spyglass Siren and Floodpits Drowner to apply pressure early on, while also having access to cards like Shoot the Sheriff and Requiting Hex to deal with threats from the opponent, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent quickly. Additionally, the deck includes cards like Enduring Curiosity and Tishana's Tidebinder to maintain card advantage and tempo throughout the match. The mana base is optimized for a smooth curve and consistent access to all required colors.

The main focus of this Izzet Control deck is to effectively control the tempo of the game by using a combination of spells and abilities to limit the opponent's options while building card advantage. This is achieved through a mix of counterspells, removal spells, and card draw spells to maintain hand advantage and board control. The deck also includes some versatile cards like Abandon Attachments and Multiversal Passage to adapt to different situations and maintain flexibility in gameplay. Ultimately, the goal is to outlast the opponent and secure victory through superior strategy and resource management.

This deck focuses on aggressive plays with Burning/Rushing cards to quickly deal damage to the opponent and control the board. It aims to overwhelm opponents with fast and efficient creatures and burn spells. The key strategy is to maintain pressure on the opponent and quickly close out games before they can stabilize. The deck has a mix of direct damage, creature removal, and powerful creatures to keep opponents on their toes and ensure victory.
